graded_findings.rationale: The command reference remains inconsistent with the new generated metastore_head_nodes configuration while existing dscli up documentation still presents the single-node field. That is a real user-facing deployment documentation gap for the changed behavior.

The deployment design still documents a single metastore_head_node and omits the new multi-head metastore_head_nodes model. This leaves the design documentation materially stale for the changed configuration contract.

The shared repo context still maps Metastore deployment to the old single-node configuration and omits the new dscli metastore_ha flow. Because this context guides future infrastructure work, the stale ownership and behavior description is a substantive adherence gap.
